_comment: Step 4.10 (04-program §5): mutation testing over the intelligence engine — the place a silent bug is most costly after the finance calculators (which get their own scope in Phase 5). OPT-IN via `npm run test:mutation`; never part of the default `npm test` gate. The kill vehicle is the unit tier (the engine suites all live there); the command runner keeps our zero-framework harness — incremental caching can't see kill-vehicle changes under the command runner, so always `--force` after strengthening tests. RE-MEASURED 2026-07-03 (step 4.10b, 3,281 mutants, 9m42s): 74.86% overall — statistical core at/above the blueprint's 75–80 (engine 85.0 / persistence 91.2 / weights 90.1 / radius 78.7 / radius-persistence 77.4 / trends-glance pure half 85.7) via the four *-hardening unit suites (exact-value anchors, boundary equalities, SQL goldens, table pins); trends-glance's RENDER half excised in-source ('Stryker disable all' with reason). Remaining drag is copy/label surfaces accepted as-is: view.js 66.0 card copy, signals.js 61.9 residual regex/label mutants, config 40.9 / observations 56.6 / search 63.6 — headroom for a future ratchet, not debt. `break` stays a RATCHET FLOOR (raise-only, kept just under measurement; was 55 at the 2026-07-02 56.43% baseline).
